title: Warm Creamy American Chicken Casserole
description: A comforting, wine-infused casserole perfect for a sick day, featuring heavy cream and nuka-pickle for a unique twist, and high-protein friendly ingredients to help with recovery.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, saute the chicken, mushrooms, onion, and garlic in a little bit of oil until the chicken is cooked through.
Add the white wine to the skillet and stir to deglaze, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom.
In a large bowl, whisk together the heavy cream and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Add the cooked chicken mixture, nuka-pickle, and shredded cheddar cheese to the bowl and stir until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and smooth out the top.
Bake the casserole in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the casserole is hot and bubbly.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
